text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, during the lead-up to the Hanshin J.F.,
my colleague approaches me while I'm eating
lunch in the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: I heard about your debut race.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
About you and that trainee of yours. Apparently,
she threw a big fit and caused everyone a lot of
hassle.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Get your act together. You're supposed to be
guiding her!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But that isn't to say that children don't know the
right path themselves.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
They have their own compass, and it works even
without any guidance from adults. They're not
babies, after all.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...? Hello? Anyone home?
choice_data_list: Sorry, I was just thinking about something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Hanshin J.F. I go to the spot
Sweep Tosho and I agreed to meet, where I find
another Umamusume there with her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sweep. Wait.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The other day, when you were half-asleep, I
heard you saying you didn't want to race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If the situation you're in is hindering your growth,
you should consider stepping away from it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Which is to say, if you want to take a break from
racing, take a break. If you don't want to do
interviews, decline. And if you need assistance, I'll
help you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Or is your trainer the source of your anxiety? If
you want to change to another trainer—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Shaddup!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I hate stuff like this the most! I hate, hate, hate it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Talk about getting rejected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(That's Tokai Teio. She's a charismatic
Umamusume who grabs people's hearts and never
lets go. She even made a miraculous recovery
after getting injured.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So you saw that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're too motherly, Air Groove. That's why
Sweep pushes you away.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: "Motherly"?! I'm just—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you're that worried, just go watch her race
without saying anything. There's someone running
who I've got my eyes on, so I'll be there too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like our relationship is a cause of concern
not just for other trainers, but for other
Umamusume as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is pouting. I still don't know how to
cheer her up when her mood suddenly sours like
this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not her parent. We don't always need to be
comforting each other. So in that case...
choice_data_list: I know you can do it, Sweep.
I know you can do it, Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
